checks.summary: Origin refs fetched and pruned; origin/main fingerprint recorded.
Expected clean production commit and healthy core services re-confirmed.
No immediate stop condition triggered; storage remains critical at 95 percent and Redis remains near maxmemory.
Reverification found 22 confirmed and one partially confirmed finding; no finding was removed or reduced by the four commits after production.

Three content commits and three merge commits add offline review plus limited RWDR activation; no changed blob in pull request 288 triggered the redacting secret scanner, and the final-gate implementation remains unchanged.

Pull request 288 advanced origin/main during remediation and is integrated locally without rewriting the three P0-A commits. It resolves none of the 23 findings, changes no final release-gate implementation, and introduces an undeployed migration that remains explicitly subject to GATE-07. Its 32 changed blobs produced no redacted secret-scanner finding.

Seventeen credential, raw-diagnostic, and ACME runtime artifacts were removed; full non-ignored worktree scanning, redaction, hooks, CI, lifecycle, rotation, permission, and history plans are implemented and locally tested. Production rotation, permission repair, and history rewrite remain gated.

Fifteen scanner/control tests, twenty-one affected backend tests, three frontend auth-token tests, one SEO redaction test, Ruff, hook shell syntax, workflow YAML, fail-closed invalid-tree behavior, and diff checks passed.
